title: Makefile: add cross compile targets for more arches
body:
This commit adds additional targets for which we provide binary packages
on fedora and other distros.

Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

@vrothberg @mheon @baude @rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat

comments.body: gotta check if Cirrus checks for these targets, I don't see linux/$other_arch listed in `cross_task`
